properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 66/13
NORWEGIAN SEA
SEISMIC SURVEY IN PROGRESS BY M/V ARTEMIS ARTIC IN AREA BOUNDED BY:
A. 67-07.0N 010-52.0E
B. 67-07.0N 011-54.0E
C. 66-34.0N 011-23.0E
D. 66-34.0N 010-26.0E
VESSEL TOWING 8 X 6000 METRES LONG CABLES, MARKED WITH YELLOW  TAIL BUOYS AND FLASHING LIGHT AT THE END OF THE CABELS.
GUARD VESSELS MAINPORT ELM AND MARTIN MICHIEL IN ATTENDANCE. 
ALL TRAFFIC REQUESTED TO GIVE WIDE BERTH, 5 MILES ASTERN, 3 MILES ON THE SIDES AND AHEAD
